data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Conditional visibility (show only if X is true)', but the evidence provided does not confirm this requirement. The linked use case outlines various custom fields but does not specify how conditional visibility is implemented or validated. This indicates a gap in the requirement coverage, as there is no evidence of the necessary conditions or logic to support the visibility feature.
gaps: No evidence of implementation or validation for conditional visibility based on specific conditions.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Define conditional visibility logic
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Verify that fields are displayed based on specific conditions being true.
